description: Structured vector schema for encoding taste decisions across 100days projects

density.detect: element count, fill ratio, particle count

agency.low: autonomous, no user input changes outcome
agency.high: piece is constituted by interaction, meaningless without input
agency.detect: event listener count, input elements, audio/camera APIs

legibility.detect: text content ratio, label elements, data display

determinism.high: same input always same output, parametric
determinism.detect: Math.random frequency, noise functions, seed usage

complexity.high: multi-layered system, emergent behavior from many rules
complexity.detect: line count, function count, algorithm sophistication

physicality.high: simulates forces, gravity, springs, fluid, collision
physicality.detect: physics keywords (velocity, force, mass, spring, gravity, damping)

palette_restraint.high: monochrome or single accent, maximum restraint
palette_restraint.detect: unique color count, accent color count

material.description: perceptual substrate — what the piece is made of
material.detect: canvas vs pre vs svg vs dom, character rendering, fillRect vs fillText

temporal_mode.description: how the piece relates to time
temporal_mode.detect: animation loop structure, state convergence, input-driven updates

referent.detect: data imports, real-world labels, explanatory text

scale.description: perceptual scale — particle vs field vs system
scale.detect: zoom level, element size relative to canvas, hierarchy depth
